scripts.build:wasm: bash tools/build_refpack_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_big_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_ini_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_gamedata_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_armor_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_weapon_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_locomotor_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_ocl_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_thing_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_command_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_progression_wasm.sh && bash tools/build_player_wasm.sh
scripts.test:wasm: node tools/test_refpack_module.mjs && node tools/test_big_module.mjs && node tools/test_ini_module.mjs && node tools/test_gamedata_module.mjs && node tools/test_armor_module.mjs && node tools/test_weapon_module.mjs && node tools/test_locomotor_module.mjs && node tools/test_ocl_module.mjs && node tools/test_thing_module.mjs && node tools/test_command_module.mjs && node tools/test_progression_module.mjs && node tools/test_player_module.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run build:wasm && npm run test:wasm && npm run validate:real && npm run validate:web
